input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.6.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have an insulation monitoring device (imd) installed in the tractive system

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.6.1: The vehicle must have an Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD) installed in the Tractive System
EV.7.6.1 The vehicle must have an Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD) installed in the Tractive System

final_answer: The vehicle must have an Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD) installed in the Tractive System
